Itslearning.RestApi.Entities.LightBulletins.LightBulletinImage

Represents an image, uploaded to light bulletin.

NameDescriptionTypeAdditional information
PreviewFileId

The identifier of the preview file for the attached image.

 integer

None.
PreviewFileUrl

The Url to the preview file for the attached image.

 string

None.
OriginalFileId

The identifier of the original file for the attached image.

 integer

None.
OriginalFileUrl

The Url to the original file for the attached image.

 string

None.
